A plugin for Zotero to automatically retrieve citation, official code link, conference, related papers and so on.

Zotero plugin/addon to automatically include the name of the currently selected collection as a tag to a new item.

Helper for managing arXiv papers in Zotero
Zotero plugin for auto-fetching citation counts from various sources
Zotero plugin, fetching publication metadata and cite counts (w/ and w/o self citations) from the INSPIRE-HEP database (and CrossRef cite counts for papers in other fields)

Chart in Zotero

ZotCard is a plug-in for Zotero, which is a card note-taking enhancement tool. It provides card templates (such as concept card, character card, golden sentence card, etc., by default, you can customize other card templates), so you can write cards quickly. In addition, it helps you sort cards and standardize card formats.
A plugin that does one thing only: Detect and manage duplicate items in Zotero.
Remove attachment(s) when delete the item(s) or collection in Zotero and JurisM.
Zotero plugin to automatically move attachments and link them
Zotero Plugin for OCR
A Zotero plugin to remove the broken & duplicate attachment link of the bibliography

Zotero plugin that links your Markdown database to Zotero. Jump directly from Zotero Items to connected Markdown files. Automatically tags Zotero Items so you can easily see which papers you've made notes for.
zotero-annotation-manage Zotero的笔记整理
scite zotero plugin

Linter for Zotero. A plugin for Zotero to format item metadata. Shortcut to set title rich text; set journal abbreviations, university places, and item languages, etc; detect duplicate items.

A Zotero plugin for syncing items and notes into Notion
